message:
fix(engine): prevent integer overflow in regime detector with saturating arithmetic

The RunLengthStats::add_observation method previously used bare addition and
multiplication on i64 values, which could overflow when processing extreme
signal values (e.g., near i64::MAX). Similarly, the recent-window mean
calculation summed i64 values without overflow protection.

Changes:
- Replace `self.sum += x` with `self.sum.saturating_add(x)`
- Compute sum_sq via i128 intermediate with saturating_mul/saturating_div,
  then clamp back to i64 bounds before saturating_add
- Compute recent_window mean via i128 sum with clamp to i64 range
- Add 457 lines of enrichment tests covering overflow edge cases, hash
  sensitivity, regime transition boundaries, and detector state invariants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
